narrative:
Oxford Twp 3 (precinct in Butler County) has 980 registered voters, with 44.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
